title: Can Being Too Honest With Kids Backfire? Experts Weigh In
summary: When falsehoods paper over uncomfortable topics, Omar Gudiño, Ph.D., deputy clinical director at Child Mind Institute, recommends thinking about why you’re sharing the information. The post Can Being Too Honest With Kids Backfire? Experts Weigh In appeared first on Child Mind Institute.
